content: Let's make sure the headline leads with the benefit, per the brand voice guide.
Agreed — first draft of the hero is in review, rest coming this week.
This is the make-or-break feature for Q3. Flag blockers early.
Blocked on the builder UI shape — need the final state schema before I wire the query engine.
Got 12 beta customers signed up — over target. 🎉
Draft gap analysis started. Encryption-at-rest and audit logging look solid; access reviews need work.
